title: crocodilodes antunesii
intro: Crocodilodes antunesii, also known as Crocodile Bark, is a type of shrub native to the tropical regions of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crocodilodes antunesii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the bark of the plant can be made into a tea or infused in oil to be used topically or taken internally.
